title: Squirrel Removal in Kingsbridge, Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Kingsbridge, Bronx. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Serving Broadway corridor & Riverdale Ave. Call today!
intro: Squirrels in Kingsbridge's classic apartment buildings and historic homes can cause serious attic damage, chew through wiring, and create persistent noise disturbances. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout the Kingsbridge neighborhood, from the Broadway corridor to properties near Van Cortlandt Park. Our humane removal process includes extraction, entry point sealing, and full damage restoration.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience handling squirrel infestations in Kingsbridge's diverse building types, from pre-war walk-ups to single-family homes near the Harlem River. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods and offer guaranteed exclusion work to prevent re-entry, ensuring your property remains squirrel-free year-round.
localContext: Kingsbridge's tree-lined streets and proximity to Van Cortlandt Park create an ideal habitat for gray squirrels seeking shelter in residential attics and commercial buildings along West 231st Street and Broadway. The neighborhood's mix of century-old homes and mid-rise apartment buildings provides numerous entry points that our experienced team knows how to identify and seal.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Kingsbridge?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Kingsbridge typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Kingsbridge homes and buildings?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and deteriorated fascia boards common in Kingsbridge's older buildings. They can squeeze through openings as small as 1.5 inches and are particularly active in fall and spring when seeking nesting sites.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, NYC-compliant removal methods including one-way exclusion doors and live trapping when necessary. Squirrels are safely relocated according to local regulations, and we never use poisons or harmful techniques that could endanger the animals or your family.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Kingsbridge?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for squirrel emergencies in Kingsbridge. Our team understands that squirrels can cause significant damage quickly, especially to electrical wiring and insulation, so we prioritize rapid response to protect your property and restore your peace of mind.
